data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multiple clock-ins per day.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for multiple clock-ins per day (split shifts). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for multiple clock-ins, but there are no specific examples or evidence demonstrating that this feature has been tested or validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of multiple clock-ins per day functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multiple clock-ins requirement.
